title: Add WBTC as Collateral on Aave V3 with 70% LTV
description: Proposal to add Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) as a collateral asset on Aave V3 with the following parameters: Loan-to-Value ratio of 70%, Liquidation Threshold of 75%, and Liquidation Bonus of 10%. WBTC has demonstrated strong liquidity and stability across major DEXs with consistent oracle price feeds.
